uplink.description: Status report: channel-1 open, channel-2 closed, battery 3.0 V
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame derived from the upstream example input (TTN r718lb2 status report). deviceType 69=0x45=R718LB2; reportType 0x01; byte3=30 -> 3.0 V; byte4=1 -> channel-1 open; byte5=0 -> channel-2 closed. expected.data authored to the normalized vocabulary (action.contactState + extra contactState2); confirmed against the upstream oracle which decodes Volt=3, status1=1, status2=0.

uplink.description: Status report: channel-1 closed, channel-2 open, battery 3.6 V
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame. byte3=36 -> 3.6 V; byte4=0 -> channel-1 closed; byte5=1 -> channel-2 open. Covers the inverse channel states from vector 1. Upstream oracle: Volt=3.6, status1=0, status2=1.

uplink.description: Status report: both channels open, low battery flag set (2.8 V)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame exercising the low-battery flag. byte3=156=0x9C -> high bit set (lowBattery true), low 7 bits 0x1C=28 -> 2.8 V; both channels open. Upstream oracle: Volt='2.8(low battery)', status1=1, status2=1.

uplink.description: Startup version report (fPort 6, reportType 0x00) carries no measurement
uplink._note: Upstream example input for the device-info/startup frame. reportType 0x00 carries version/datecode (upstream oracle: SWver=10, HWver=11, Datecode=20200424), not a measurement -> error.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 is not a data report
uplink._note: Upstream example input for a ConfigReportRsp on fPort 7; carries no measurement -> error.
